title: Sticky Traps Pest Traps Boards - Large Extra Strong Sticky Trap Pests Trap Pads for Indoor Outdoor Garden Kitchen Office (5 Pack)
bullet_points: 🏡 Multi-Use Pest Sticky Board: You will receive 5/10 Packs of pest sticky traps. The long-lasting effectiveness ensures continuous pest control, giving you a pest-free home. Target Species: Fly, Spider, Cockroach
🏡 Pest Sticky Trap Board: Our 5 Pack size set of 21 x 31cm pest sticky trap pads are made from hard paper, providing a safe as well as effective solution to tackle pest problems
🏡 Wide Application Pest Board Sticky Trap- The pest board pad sticky traps can easily used for cockroaches, flies, and other pests
🏡 Recommend Food: Cookies, cheese, sausage, peanut butter, fruit, meat
🏡 House Indoor Outdoor: Suitable for most places, kitchens, offices, meeting rooms, restaurants, behind electrical appliances, under sinks, garages, warehouses, near garbage areas
